'''Ccalras Corporation''' was an illegal corporation based in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]—a front for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] illegal businesses. They employed violent and ruthless business methods, and earned a nasty reputation.

{{Company-stub}}
